title: Burn first-actions and escalation card
summary: Stop the burning source when safe, cool the burn with cool running water, remove nearby jewellery or loose clothing not stuck to skin, and protect with a clean non-fluffy cover.
content: Stop the burning source when safe, cool the burn with cool running water, remove nearby jewellery or loose clothing not stuck to skin, and protect with a clean non-fluffy cover. Call emergency help for large, deep, electrical, chemical, airway, face, hand, genital, major-joint burns or any severe symptoms. Do not apply ice, butter, toothpaste, oils, powders, or break blisters.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Burn first-actions and escalation card”.
Pencil. Context: “Burn first-actions and escalation card”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Burn first-actions and escalation card»
steps: Stop the burning source when safe, cool the burn with cool running water, remove nearby jewellery or loose clothing not stuck to skin, and protect with a clean non-fluffy cover.
Call emergency help for large, deep, electrical, chemical, airway, face, hand, genital, major-joint burns or any severe symptoms.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Burn first-actions and escalation card.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Burn first-actions and escalation card.
warnings: Do not apply ice, butter, toothpaste, oils, powders, or break blisters.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Burn first-actions and escalation card.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Burn first-actions and escalation card.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Burn first-actions and escalation card.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Burn first-actions and escalation card.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Burn first-actions and escalation card.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Burn first-actions and escalation card.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Burn first-actions and escalation card.
short_term: For Burn first-actions and escalation card, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Burn first-actions and escalation card, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Burn first-actions and escalation card, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Burn first-actions and escalation card to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
